hero.headline: Spaces that think.
hero.subline: Architecture student with a focus on real estate market analysis. Open to opportunities, internships, freelances and collaborations across Portugal and Europe.

left.title: Projects that respond to the territory
left.body: From concept to construction detail: academic exercises and personal projects across feasibility, executive design, parametric façades, retrofit and interiors.

right.title: Data that becomes decision
right.body: Power BI dashboards, densification studies, absorption and sales velocity analysis, demographic and competitive mapping.

featured.title: Recent work
featured.description: A curation of what best represents both sides of the practice.

dataInsights.title: From floor plan to dashboard.
dataInsights.body: Every launch is also a data point. I started mapping the vertical residential output of São Paulo and São José dos Campos — by zone, typology, area, and developer — and the method is replicable for any European market.

about.title: Fernando Diogo
about.body: Architecture student, currently in training. I combine design practice with reading the city through data — to understand why some cities work and others merely exist. Open to opportunities, internships, freelances and collaborations across Portugal and Europe.

testimonials.quote: A rare combination of architectural sensibility and analytical market reading.
testimonials.author: Maria Santos

contactCta.title: Let's collaborate.
contactCta.subtitle: Opportunities, internships, freelances, projects or collaborations — get in touch.
